features: [Game Mode & Music Mode] : PH4 headset with microphone feature a dedicated game audio mode that enhances in-game sound effects and voice clarity, giving you a competitive edge. Turn to music mode for an immersive audio experience, perfect for everyday listening and movie watching. Whether you're engaged in intense gaming or enjoying a relaxing music session, it seamlessly change between modes to meet all your needs, delivering superior clarity and depth

[Low Latency & Wide Compatibility] : Awinnasey upgraded wireless gaming headset offers multiple connectivity options: 5.4 Bluetooth, 2.4G USB dongle mode. Enjoy ultra-low latency (≤20ms) and a Bluetooth range of up to 15 meters, ensuring you never miss a moment of the action. Compatible with PS5, PS4, PC, Mac, Switch, Pad, Phone, or Laptop, the wireless gaming headphones delivers reliable stable connection
[Please Note] : Not compatible with Xbox all series. Microphone does Not work with Switch. Dongle mode is Not compatible with Switch. Bluetooth mode is Not compatible with PS4, PS5

[Noise Reduction Microphone & LED light] : The 120 degree adjustable mic design allows you to easily remove the mic. And our gaming headphones with microphone enhanced performance through advanced noise reduction processing technology. Effectively eliminates up to 95% of environmental noise, ensuring your clear communication. To enhance your gaming environment, our over ear headphones feature cool LED lighting

[Ergonomics & Foldable Design] : Designed for ultimate comfort. The protein memory foam earcups mimic the texture of human skin and fit your ears perfectly without causing any discomfort, and the headband is flexibly adjustable. 1200mA battery capacity and up to 30-hour use time allow you to use our bluetooth gaming headset for all day. Our bluetooth headphones wireless is a great companion for your work, gaming
description: Immerse Yourself in Superior Gaming Sound with Our over ear Wireless Gaming Headset! Unlock the next level of gaming with our cutting-edge wireless gaming headphones with mic. Offering two connectivity options – 2.4GHz USB dongle, and Bluetooth– tailor your experience to match your gaming setup seamlessly. Compatible with a range of devices, our wireless headset ensures a versatile gaming experience. Equipped with a powerful 50mm dynamic driver, our wireless headphones for ps5 delivers exceptional audio quality, bringing your games to life. The detachable noise-canceling microphone eradicates 95% of ambient noise, providing crystal-clear communication during intense battles. Designed with comfort in mind, the ultra-lightweight wireless gaming headsets for ps5 with mic feature an ergonomic adjustable headband and plush protein memory foam ear cushions. With a substantial 1200mAh battery capacity, enjoy an extended 30-hour gaming marathon without worrying about recharging. The package includes a USB charging cable, 2.4GHz USB dongle, and a comprehensive user manual. Upgrade your gaming experience – choose Awinnasey over ear wireless gaming headphones and step into a world of immersive sound and unparalleled comfort.
